description: Register an IBM Db2 resource for use by other components. Works against Db2 LUW, Db2 Community Edition, Db2 on Cloud, and Db2 Warehouse.

resource_key.label: Resource Key
resource_key.description: Resource registration key. Other components reference it via this name.

port.label: Port
port.description: Db2 port (default 50000 on-prem; 31xxx for Db2 on Cloud)

ssl.label: SSL
ssl.description: Enable SSL. Required for Db2 on Cloud.

security_mechanism.label: Security Mechanism
security_mechanism.description: Optional SecurityMechanism override (e.g. 'PLAIN'). Leave unset for default.
